title: Extracted gDNA Plate Compression
author: Rodolfo A Salido Benitez
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ua4esgw

steps.title: Follow the diagram below while setting up the epMotion worktable
steps.instruction: Follow the diagram below while setting up the epMotion worktable. Place (

steps.title: boxes of 20 - 300 µL epT
steps.instruction: boxes of 20 - 300 µL epT.I.P.S. w/filters on deck slots A2-A

steps.title: Place 96-well gDNA Plates 1-4 on...
steps.instruction: Place 96-well gDNA Plates 1-4 on deck slots B2-B3 and C2-C3 respectively. Place 384-well PP or LDV Destination Plate on slot C1

steps.title: Remove box lids and plate foils and execute protocol
steps.instruction: Remove box lids and plate foils and execute protocol. (Protocol must be imported to epBlue software prior to attempting to execute it. epBlue 40.6 or later ) Application_gDNA_plate compression_4-96 to 1-384 pp_181003_105135.export6 The automated protocol transfers 60µL of extracted gDNA from each source well into the destination plate following the plate layout outlined in the description of this protocol.io
